title: IMAGE to LATENT socket mismatch
user_phrasing: why won't these ComfyUI nodes connect
canonical_summary: Route here when a ComfyUI workflow fails because one node emits IMAGE while the next expects LATENT, or when socket datatype boundaries are likely involved.
must_retrieve: object_info or source-backed node definition if exact node names are required
source_priority_rule: For exact socket and class_type claims, installed object_info or source-backed node definitions outrank memory and old archive notes.
answer_pattern: Explain the socket mismatch, identify the datatype boundary, recommend verifying the output/input socket types, and avoid inventing exact node names unless source-backed.
exactness_guard: Do not invent node class_type names, conversion nodes, or workflow paths without retrieved evidence.
notes: Small-model friendly card: concrete, narrow, and source-aware.
